style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Lapras's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plates. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its armor seams, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into metallic dust particles drifting in slow motion. The aura is a cool, intense cerulean halo with sharp geometric edges, illuminating the surrounding water with a crystalline glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
